channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Todd Blanche's high-stakes confirmation hearing for attorney general is underway
item.description: President Trump's former personal attorney is under the microscope on Capitol Hill. Lawmakers on the Senate Judiciary Committee are questioning Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, whom Trump has nominated for the job permanently.
item.content:encoded: President Trump's former personal attorney is under the microscope on Capitol Hill. Lawmakers on the Senate Judiciary Committee are questioning Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, whom Trump has nominated for the job permanently.
item.dc:creator: Jaclyn Diaz

item.title: Acting AG Todd Blanche faces high-stakes confirmation hearing
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche will be on Capitol Hill Wednesday for his high-stakes confirmation hearing to lead the Justice Department permanently.
item.content:encoded: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche will be on Capitol Hill Wednesday for his high-stakes confirmation hearing to lead the Justice Department permanently.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas

item.title: Sen. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., on the confirmation hearing for AG nominee Todd Blanche
item.description: NPR's Leila Fadel asks Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff what he plans to ask Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche at his confirmation hearing.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Leila Fadel asks Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff what he plans to ask Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche at his confirmation hearing.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: American AI is expensive. Some startups are turning to cheap Chinese models
item.description: AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models.
item.content:encoded:
AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models.

(Image credit: Imen Ben Youssef/Hans Lucas)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to appear for confirmation hearing, U.S. restarts blockade against Iran amid standoff over the Strait of Hormuz, ICE suspends traffic stops after deadly shootings.
item.content:encoded: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to appear for confirmation hearing, U.S. restarts blockade against Iran amid standoff over the Strait of Hormuz, ICE suspends traffic stops after deadly shootings.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Bill Maher on comedy, atheism and dining with Trump
item.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with comedian Bill Maher about what drives his ideas and what it means to win the Mark Twain prize for American Humor.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with comedian Bill Maher about what drives his ideas and what it means to win the Mark Twain prize for American Humor.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: More than 1,600 cases of intestinal illness cyclosporiasis reported in the U.S.
item.description: The CDC has confirmed more than 1,600 cases of a gastrointestinal parasitic infection. More than 140 people have been hospitalized, as the CDC looks for the source.
item.content:encoded: The CDC has confirmed more than 1,600 cases of a gastrointestinal parasitic infection. More than 140 people have been hospitalized, as the CDC looks for the source.
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: Wheelchair users say lack of competition in repair market leads to long wait times
item.description: People who use wheelchairs say simple repairs can take months to complete and replacement parts can be very expensive. In part, they blame two private equity firms that control most of the market.
item.content:encoded: People who use wheelchairs say simple repairs can take months to complete and replacement parts can be very expensive. In part, they blame two private equity firms that control most of the market.
item.dc:creator: Meghan H Smith

item.title: Baltimore to overhaul how it responds to calls for mental health and other services
item.description: Baltimore is setting up a fourth branch of first responders in addition to fire, police and EMS. They will handle calls for people needing mental health support, but also connection to city services.
item.content:encoded: Baltimore is setting up a fourth branch of first responders in addition to fire, police and EMS. They will handle calls for people needing mental health support, but also connection to city services.
item.dc:creator: Scott Maucione

item.title: Trump floats control of the Strait of Hormuz. Making it happen would be challenging
item.description: President Trump has talked about the U.S. fully controlling the Strait of Hormuz. But for the US military that means much more than imposing yet another blockade on the key waterway.
item.content:encoded: President Trump has talked about the U.S. fully controlling the Strait of Hormuz. But for the US military that means much more than imposing yet another blockade on the key waterway.
item.dc:creator: Tom Bowman
